label: Vespera Tertius Voidgirt Dock
description: Vespera Tertius Voidgirt Dock is a basalt-reinforced landing frontage cut into an ash-choked basin, its load-bearers clad in scorched ceramite plating and lattice trusses blackened by repeated plasma wash. Beacon pylons ring the berth in tight intervals, their lumen-bands tuned for the planet’s bruise-colored auroral glare and the persistent vox-shear that fractures outbound traffic. The surface is paved in fused glasscrete scored by drag-marks and impact pitting, with drainage channels choked by electrostatic ash. Auspex baffles and blast shutters line the edgeworks, reflecting the narrow, hazardous approach corridors imposed by the wreckage-cluttered orbit above.
